note: Crafts of the emotional_logical axis — a horizon Reach now brought online. Pathos is the emotional-pole tradition (feeling as force, resonance-of-heart); Logos the logical-pole (reason as force, inference-as-power). Learned by traveling the Reach or training with the Deepfeelers / the Reasoners. Both drift the wielder toward their pole. Function tags included per canon. axes signed for engine compat. Authored by Aevi (PO), SNG-016 — first horizon-axis tradition.

abilities.name: Pathos
abilities.narrationHints: Feeling made a force — the true emotion of a room surfaced, a grief shared and eased, a passion kindled or cooled by one who feels it first and hardest.
abilities.description: The emotional-pole mastery: reading, moving, and sharing feeling as a real force. Not manipulation — resonance; the Deepfeelers' art.
abilities.notFor: Forcing a feeling on the unwilling (Pathos resonates, it does not compel); cold analysis (that's Logos); faking an emotion — Pathos works by feeling it truly first.

tree.name: The Open Heart
tree.grants: Feel the true emotion under a room or a person, past what they show; share a feeling so it eases (a grief halved, a fear steadied); kindle a genuine passion in the willing.
tree.cannot: Reads and shares; does not command; the guarded can close to it; feeling their pain means feeling it.

tree.name: The Shared Fire
tree.grants: Move a crowd by feeling-with-them; carry a person through an emotion too big to bear alone; make an unspoken feeling undeniable in the open.
tree.cannot: You take on what you move — the cost is real; a will set against feeling resists; moving a mob is riding a wave, not steering it.

tree.name: The Deep Chord
tree.grants: Feeling at the scale of peoples — turn a room, a mob, a mourning-crowd by the truth of shared feeling; reach a heart no reason could; hold another's whole emotional weight for a time. The Deepfeelers' power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts emotion-hot — feeling everything, all the time, until the self drowns; emotion without reason to shape it becomes storm, and a storm forecloses on thought as surely as ice does on feeling.

abilities.name: Logos
abilities.narrationHints: Reason made a force — an argument that lands like a blow, a contradiction exposed, a conclusion so clean it changes what people must do.
abilities.description: The logical-pole mastery: inference, argument, and proof as real forces that move minds and situations. The Reasoners' art.
abilities.notFor: Reaching a heart set against reason (that's Pathos); wisdom (Logos is valid, not necessarily wise); a premise that's false — Logos builds truly on what it's given, garbage in and all.

tree.name: The Clear Argument
tree.grants: Build an argument that compels the reasonable; expose a contradiction so it can't be unseen; deduce a hidden fact from what's present.
tree.cannot: The unreasonable and the emotion-ruled resist; a valid argument from a false premise still lands false.

tree.name: The Binding Proof
tree.grants: Prove a thing so cleanly the proof itself changes what people must do; corner a liar in their own logic; model a situation and derive its necessary outcome.
tree.cannot: Proof binds the honest and the logical; the Cathedral of Convincing (true pieces, false whole) survives it; a proof of the unwelcome can be refused by force.

tree.name: The Necessary Conclusion
tree.grants: Reason at the scale of peoples — an argument a whole council cannot answer, a contradiction that topples a doctrine, a conclusion so inescapable it forecloses a bad course before it starts. The Reasoners' power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts logic-hot — toward the Cogitarium's cold, reason that has forgotten the feeling it was meant to serve; logic without heart reaches monstrous-but-valid conclusions (Ninefold's road), the foreclosure of the frozen mind.

abilities.name: The Turning Word
abilities.narrationHints: The room turns — a crowd, a court, a mob — moved as one by the exact true thing said the exact right way.
abilities.description: The social capstone: move a whole gathering at once — turn a hostile crowd, sway a council, stop a mob — by finding and speaking the one thing that reaches all of them. Pathos and Logos fused into mass persuasion.
abilities.notFor: Individual mind-control; moving those with no shared feeling or reason; forcing against a set will.

tree.name: The Turning Word
tree.grants: Turn a crowd or council decisively — the room moves as one when you find the word that reaches them.
tree.cannot: Needs a real shared chord to strike; a crowd set immovably resists; you feel/carry what you move.

abilities.name: The Grief Strike
abilities.narrationHints: It doesn't hurt where you put your hands. It hurts where you feel.
abilities.description: Strike at the emotional self — send a true, intense feeling at a person in a way they cannot close off.

tree.name: The True Feeling
tree.grants: Direct a genuine, intense feeling at a person — grief, shame, terror — that they cannot close off because it is true and they know it.

tree.name: The Unguarded Place
tree.grants: Find and open the grief a person has been protecting — the loss they haven't admitted, the feeling they've been keeping functional by not opening.

tree.name: The Shattered Fortification
tree.grants: Break an emotional fortification entirely — what they've been using to stay functional is now open and requires tending before they can operate again.

abilities.name: The Felt Wall
abilities.narrationHints: She felt the danger before the knife moved. Feeling was always faster.
abilities.description: Protect through emotional early warning — the feeling of threat before it fully forms.

tree.name: Early Feel
tree.grants: Feel a threat forming in a room's emotional weather — in a person's shifting feeling-state — in time to move before the action completes.

tree.name: The Feeling Guard
tree.grants: Protect someone by feeling the danger around them — your emotional sense is the guard watching what eyes don't catch.

tree.name: The Felt Ward
tree.grants: What shifts toward violence or harm in a space reaches you first, across the whole space, and you act in the gap it gives.

abilities.name: The True Feeling
abilities.narrationHints: She knew what the room was feeling before anyone spoke.
abilities.description: Read what is actually felt — not what is shown, what is present.

tree.name: The Actual State
tree.grants: Feel the true emotional state of a person or room — not what is displayed, what is actually present underneath it.

tree.name: The Feeling Trail
tree.grants: Track a feeling over time — follow grief, find where fear developed, trace the emotional mark a person left in those they touched.

tree.name: The Emotional History
tree.grants: Read the feeling-truth of a whole history — what a place carries, what a people have been running from, what a person has felt for years without naming.

abilities.name: The Made Elegy
abilities.narrationHints: She made the grief into something with edges you could touch.
abilities.description: Give feeling a form — make something that holds emotion correctly, so it can persist, be shared, or returned to.

tree.name: The Feeling Held
tree.grants: Make something that holds a feeling correctly — a song, an object, a gesture — so the feeling persists in it and can be shared or returned to.

tree.name: The Acting Elegy
tree.grants: Bind a feeling into a made thing so it acts — the song that makes people feel what it carries, the totem that sustains or destabilizes the one who holds it.

tree.name: The Lasting Work
tree.grants: Make something that carries feeling at scale — art that moves a city, a ritual that holds a people's grief, something that does what you felt long after you're gone.

abilities.name: The Feeling Road
abilities.narrationHints: She followed the grief the way others follow a road.
abilities.description: Navigate by feeling — find a person, a place, or a source by following the emotional resonance it leaves.

tree.name: The Resonance Trail
tree.grants: Navigate toward a feeling — find a person, a place, or a source by following the emotional trace they leave across a space.

tree.name: The Feeling Landmark
tree.grants: Travel toward a powerful feeling in a region as if it were a beacon — grief, joy, terror — and find what is creating it.

tree.name: The Long Trail
tree.grants: Follow a feeling's trace across any distance — track a person by their emotional signature, find the source of what is moving a whole community.

abilities.name: The Wellspring
abilities.narrationHints: She was exhausted and the feeling was still there. The feeling was enough.
abilities.description: Sustain through emotional depth — what others run out of, you find more of in the next wave.

tree.name: More in the Depth
tree.grants: Sustain through the depth of feeling — where others run dry, you find the next wave of grief or joy, and it holds you.

tree.name: The Carried Weight
tree.grants: Your emotional depth sustains others — not by removing the hardship but by carrying some of it with them so they don't carry it alone.

tree.name: The Wellspring Holds
tree.grants: The depth sustains the party through the hardest stretch — not comfort, depth; not peace, feeling so genuine it holds people together until it's over.

abilities.name: The Correct Protocol
abilities.narrationHints: He knew exactly what was wrong. The treatment followed.
abilities.description: Heal through precise diagnosis and correct procedure — the methodical application of what is known to work.

tree.name: Correct Diagnosis
tree.grants: Diagnose and treat through methodical application of what is known to work — no guesswork, no comfort, the correct intervention.

tree.name: By Protocol
tree.grants: Restore through proper sequence — the correct actions done in the correct order return the body or system to function without anything left out.

tree.name: Root Cause
tree.grants: Restore completely by identifying the underlying cause and applying the full chain of correct interventions — nothing unaddressed, no relapse from what was left.

abilities.name: The Proved Position
abilities.narrationHints: He had proved it. They could attack him all they liked. The proof still stood.
abilities.description: Protect through irrefutable argument — attacks on a proved position must answer the proof before they can land.

tree.name: Proved Ground
tree.grants: Establish a position so logically secure that attacks — social, rhetorical, physical — must first answer the proof before they have any purchase.

tree.name: The Extended Proof
tree.grants: Extend the proved position to cover a space or a group — a claim so airtight it functions as a ward against what depends on its denial.

tree.name: The Self-Maintaining Proof
tree.grants: A proved position holds at scale — at the level of institutions, treaties, or laws — and no force that cannot answer the argument can unmake what it established.

abilities.name: The Built System
abilities.narrationHints: He didn't build a thing. He built a rule, and the rule built things.
abilities.description: Build a logical structure that operates in the world — a system whose internal logic sustains it without constant maintenance.

tree.name: The Working Rule
tree.grants: Design a system — legal, social, procedural — that functions because the logic it runs on is sound.

tree.name: Self-Regulating
tree.grants: Build something that maintains itself through its internal logic — not enforced, not reminded, running because the reasoning it embodies is correct.

tree.name: The Lasting Structure
tree.grants: Construct a system so logically coherent it operates at scale without you — the laws, institutions, or mechanisms that run because the reasoning they embody is right.

abilities.name: The Derived Route
abilities.narrationHints: He hadn't walked it. He had worked it out.
abilities.description: Navigate through pure reasoning — derive the correct path from what you know before taking a step.

tree.name: Reasoned Path
tree.grants: Navigate any space by reasoning about it — what must be true about the layout, the route, the exits — without needing to see it first.

tree.name: Inferred Route
tree.grants: Derive the correct path through unknown territory by inference — from what you know about the type of space, the likely structure, the probable exits.

tree.name: The Necessary Route
tree.grants: Navigate to any conclusion that follows necessarily from known premises — the route that must exist, the exit that must be there, the gap the logic requires.

abilities.name: The Axiom Holds
abilities.narrationHints: The certainty was enough. The axiom held and therefore so did he.
abilities.description: Sustain through the certainty of what you know — fear, pain, and doubt don't reach the level of the axioms.

tree.name: Axiomatic Ground
tree.grants: Hold function under pressure through the certainty of what you know — fear, pain, and doubt operate below the level the axioms hold.

tree.name: The Correct Sequence
tree.grants: Sustain across a hard stretch through pure logical discipline — the sequence of correct actions that keeps you going regardless of how you feel about them.

tree.name: The Axiom Holds
tree.grants: As long as what you know is true remains true, you remain functional around it. The axiom is the ground and the ground does not give.
